since_last: 48% of 100 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.22%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 48% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.79% · BTC +0.35% · Gold +0.78% · Nasdaq100 -1.88%. 48% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.22%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.22%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.79%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: POWL is the standout at +5.21%
cards.body: Leaders: POWL +5.21%, DLR +3.26%, TER +2.90%, LRCX +2.85%, AMAT +2.82%. Laggards: BIDU -4.33%, NOW -2.37%, MGNI -1.96%, SAP -1.77%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.35% at $138.66
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.35% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
